---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.projects-header}

## Things I've Built

::: {.accent-line}
:::

A collection of projects spanning data science, analytics, and web development.

:::

::: {.project-card}

### Budget App

A personal budgeting application to help track spending, set savings goals, and visualize where your money goes.

[GitHub Pages]{.tech-tag}
[Web App]{.tech-tag}
[Data Visualization]{.tech-tag}

[View Project](https://seanlewis08.github.io/budget_app/){.btn-project}
&nbsp;&nbsp;
[Source Code](https://github.com/seanlewis08/budget_app){.btn-project}

:::

::: {.project-card}

### Popcorn Machine

A sports analytics web app featuring box scores, game flow visualizations, and data-driven insights — powered by a Python data pipeline and a TypeScript/HTML frontend.

[TypeScript]{.tech-tag}
[Python]{.tech-tag}
[Sports Analytics]{.tech-tag}
[Data Pipeline]{.tech-tag}

[View Project](https://seanlewis08.github.io/popcornmachine/#/){.btn-project}
&nbsp;&nbsp;
[Source Code](https://github.com/seanlewis08/popcornmachine){.btn-project}

:::

<br>

*More projects coming soon — check back or follow along on [GitHub](https://github.com/seanlewis08).*
